sections.title: What is the Present Continuous?
sections.content:
We use the **Present Continuous** for things happening **now** or **around now**.

• I **am working** now.
• She **is reading** a book.
• They **are playing** football.

sections.title: Form
sections.content:
**am / is / are** + verb + **-ing**

• I **am working**
• He/she/it **is working**
• You/we/they **are working**

sections.title: Spelling: -ing
sections.content:
• work → work**ing**
• make → mak**ing** (drop e)
• run → runn**ing** (double n)
• sit → sitt**ing** (double t)

sections.title: Negatives and Questions
sections.content:
**Negative:** I **am not** working. She **is not** (isn't) working.

**Question:** **Am** I working? **Is** she working? **Are** they working?

questions.question: He _____ TV. He is doing his homework.
Look! They _____ football.
questions.explanation: Look! = now. We use are playing.

questions.question: She _____ a letter. (write)
questions.explanation: She is writing. We drop the e when we add -ing.
